title: Communicate permaculture system principles to stakeholders
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Communicate permaculture system principles to stakeholders demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Interpret information from permaculture system designs and specifications

pcs.text: Obtain documents and design criteria for a permaculture system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain documents and design criteria for a permaculture system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain documents and design criteria for a permaculture system.

pcs.text: Interpret and extract information relevant for stakeholders' understanding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret and extract information relevant for stakeholders' understanding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret and extract information relevant for stakeholders' understanding.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and investigate information to supplement planning documents?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and investigate information to supplement planning documents.

elements.title: Check permaculture system options from site data and observations

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify permaculture system options.

pcs.text: Visit site and investigate and observe site conditions using primary and secondary data sources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Visit site and investigate and observe site conditions using primary and secondary data sources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Visit site and investigate and observe site conditions using primary and secondary data sources.

pcs.text: Verify primary and secondary data with possible design options
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify primary and secondary data with possible design options?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify primary and secondary data with possible design options.

pcs.text: Verify that permaculture principles embedded in design options are consistent with site conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify that permaculture principles embedded in design options are consistent with site conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify that permaculture principles embedded in design options are consistent with site conditions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Check permaculture system options from site data and observations

elements.title: Contrast and compile information on permaculture systems for stakeholders' information

pcs.text: Identify different permaculture systems suitable for site

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify key characteristics of each system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify key characteristics of each system.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Contrast permaculture system with conventional systems.

pcs.text: Identify key characteristics of permaculture system that benefit outcomes

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify key characteristics of permaculture system that benefit outcomes.

pcs.text: Compile information on permaculture system for site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compile information on permaculture system for site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile information on permaculture system for site.
